name: jobsearch
description: LinkedIn job search automation — scrapes listings, ranks matches, generates tailored resumes, and exports PDFs

login.description: Manual LinkedIn login to seed the browser session

scrape.description: Search LinkedIn for jobs and validate matches against criteria

rank.description: List unranked job matches for review

apply-rankings.description: Apply scores from a Claude Code review session (pass JSON string from rank output)

review.description: Start the job review UI server at localhost:3000

tailor.description: Generate tailored resumes for all approved jobs

export.description: Convert tailored markdown resumes to PDF

status.description: Print pipeline counts: seen, matches, approved, rejected, tailored PDFs

run.description: Scrape LinkedIn and list unranked matches in one step
